      About this item

      • NOTE: If headset is too tight we suggest placing them over a ball or something of similar size/shape. Leave undisturbed for at least 24 hours. Repeat if necessary. Please also try length adjustments of either earpiece until both sides best fit you.
      • JBL PURE BASS SOUND: These wirelss headpones feature the renowned JBL Pure Bass sound, which can be found in the most famous venues all around the world.
      • WIRELESS BLUETOOTH: These headphones stream wirelessly from your device and can even switch between two devices so that you don't miss a call.
      • UP TO 40 HOURS BATTERY WITH SPEED CHARGE: For long-lasting fun, listen wirelessly for up to 40 hours and recharge the battery in as little as 2 hours with the convenient Type-C USB cable. A quick 5-minute recharge gives you 2 additional hours of music.
      • MICROPHONE ON EAR CUP FOR HANDS-FREE CALLS: Easily control your sound and manage your calls from your headphones with the convenient buttons on the ear-cup.
      • ASK SIRI OR HEY GOOGLE: Siri or Hey Google is just a button away: activate the voice assistant of your device by pushing the multi-function button.
      • Featuring an adjustable headband the Tune 510BT are designed to fit nearly any head size comfortably
      › See more product details

        TCO Certified

        TCO Certified IT and technology products are certified based on lower environmental and climate impact, safer chemicals and circular design which reduces e-waste.       From the manufacturer

      About us

      • JBL has brought music to life in a way people can feel for over 70 years.
      • From iconic concerts to thesporting events, our sound has powered the world's musicians, athletes and venues.
      • We unleash the power of music so you can live life to the fullest wherever and whenever.
      • JBL speaker components deliver powerful sound.

      See More

      From the brand

      Previous page

      2. For over 75 years, JBL has helped people own their sound with Headphones, speakers and audio gear designed around expression. From the history-making stages of Woodstock to the thrilling sports stadiums, music venues and movie theaters you visit today, JBL amplifies truly unforgettable experiences.

        Booming bass, rich detail and the freedom to feel the moment, wherever you are.

      3. Visit Now

        Visit the Store

      4. JBL Tour Pro Series

        True Adaptive Noise Cancelling Technology That Tunes Out Distractions So You Can Enjoy Your Favorite Audio.

      5. JBL Tune Series

        On-Ear & Over-Ear Stereo Headphones With Wireless Bluetooth Technology. Built In Microphones For IOS And Android Devices.

      6. JBL Quantum Series

        Hear every detail of the environment around you with the superior sound of JBL Quantum. Take on new challenges. Dare to level up.

      7. JBL Endurance Series

        Enjoy JBL Pure Bass Sound While You Work Out. Stay Focused On The Task At Hand With Music That Starts And Stops When You Do.

      Customer ReviewJBL Wireless Headphones. Are They Any Good?See Full Review

      Product Description

      JBL TUNE 510BT Wireless on-ear headphones The JBL Tune 510BT headphones let you stream powerful JBL Pure Bass sound with no strings attached. Easy to use, with up to 40 hours of battery life and speed charge, they are super lightweight and comfortable. Grab them and fill your day with music! JBL Pure Bass Sound Wireless Bluetooth 5.0 Up to 40 hours battery life with speed charge Microphone on ear cup for hands-free calls Ask Siri or Hey Google For over 70 years, JBL has engineered the most precise, impressive sound found in big venues around the world. Harman's mission and vision is to make life more connected, entertaining, personalized and productive. The company combines passion and purpose to design smart products systems, software and services to connect people wherever they are.

      How customer reviews and ratings work

      Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

      To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyzed reviews to verify trustworthiness.

      Learn more how customers reviews work on Amazon

      Review this product

      Share your thoughts with other customers
      Write a customer review

      Customers say

      Customers find these headphones to be solid with good sound quality, comfort, and noise cancellation. The battery life is impressive, and they connect easily via Bluetooth, with one customer noting they can connect to multiple devices. While many customers say they work well, some report issues with only one side working properly. Customers consider them good value for money.

      Customers like the sound quality of these headphones.
      "Got these as a Christmas gift for my boyfriend. While they have great sound, we are consistently putting the protective cover of the ear pieces back..." Read more
      "Good sound. However, one of the ear pads broke off after short use, and it's nearly impossible to put it back in and reassemble it fully with screws...." Read more
      "Sound great, comfortable.... they are a like small and I have a smaller head. If you have a larger head I dont think you would be happy with the fit." Read more
      "...My husband was thrilled with the sound quality and I had to order him a pair. Then my daughter wanted a pair. Within 48 hours, I've purchased 3 pair." Read more
      2966 customers mention quality, 2594 positive, 372 negative2,966 customers mention "Quality"2,594 positive372 negative
      Customers find these headphones to be solid, with one mentioning that JBL never disappoints.
      "Great headphones, nit really a JBL fan, however trying these out last night , honestly shocked at how good the sound quality is, for the price you ca..." Read more
      "...At that price point the give great value with good quality. Perfect for my son who tends to lose things because it can be replaced at a decent price." Read more
      "...They stay charged for so long and are great quality for a great price. The noise cancellation is great, not the level of beats but still impressive...." Read more
      "...Great product for a very reasonable price. Wish they would have come with a case, but they fold up nicely in a backpack or purse." Read more
      2577 customers mention value for money, 2366 positive, 211 negative2,577 customers mention "Value for money"2,366 positive211 negative
      Customers find these headphones offer good value for money.
      "I really like these headphones, good sound, great price, but if you lose the cord that comes with them, you might not be able to charge them anymore..." Read more
      "...At that price point the give great value with good quality. Perfect for my son who tends to lose things because it can be replaced at a decent price." Read more
      "Headset is great for the price. However it doesn’t charge any longer after 1.5 years of use. I only used it when cutting the grass / doing yardwork...." Read more
      "Great sound, good material and good price. A cheap product that fits perfectly to work out or just relax. Totally comfortable and easy to use." Read more
      1838 customers mention battery life, 1532 positive, 306 negative1,838 customers mention "Battery life"1,532 positive306 negative
      Customers are satisfied with the headphones' battery life, noting that it is incredible and stays charged, with one customer mentioning they hardly ever need to recharge them.
      "This is surprisingly very good sound quality and it has a long battery life and charges quite quickly and it uses a USB C charger which it does come..." Read more
      "decent product with has what i consider to be a big flaw. OK sound, battery life, quality, etc. but the charging port is covered by the R/S stirrup...." Read more
      "...But for the price and the cuteness I can manage that. Great battery life too - I think I got a good 10 hours of listening out of them before I had..." Read more
      "...Didn’t even last me a year. It has good battery life but now it’s not letting me get into support with JBL since they didn’t even put a serial code..." Read more

      Customers find the headphones comfortable, with one mentioning they don't hurt their ears.
      "Sound great, comfortable.... they are a like small and I have a smaller head. If you have a larger head I dont think you would be happy with the fit." Read more
      "I bought these headphones for my son. He loves them. They are very comfortable. They were easy to set-up and they hold a charge for the entire day...." Read more
      "...connects to bluetooth almost instantly.. cons: uncomfortable, too small, material is rigid so you cant stretch too much, ear space is tiny..." Read more
      "Delighted with the comfort, somewhat noise-canceling feature, and notably impressive battery life of your JBL headphones, they provide a positive..." Read more

      Customers praise the headphones' Bluetooth connectivity, noting they connect easily and pair quickly with multiple devices.
      "It was easy to connect and sounds great, the ear cushioning part is just a little too small for my taste, it has a lot of motion too and is adjustable" Read more
      "these headphones are easy to pair, and they are okay to wear for a few hours, but after some time they begin to become incredibly uncomfortable on..." Read more
      "Connects easily and the sound quality is good. It only remembers two devices at a time, so if you have more, you’ll have to keep re-pairing...." Read more
      "Great battery life and decent sound when it worked. Now they will not connect to any of my android devices. Hopefully they will replace." Read more

      Perfect for gym workout
      I’ve been using these headphones for more than a year now and they still work great. I wear them every time I go to the gym. The sound quality is good, the battery lasts a long time, and they’re comfortable to wear during workouts.

      • Brittany McCue
        5.0 out of 5 stars Great everyday Bluetooth headphones—easy, comfy, and solid sound for the price
        Reviewed in the United States on January 31, 2026
        Color: RoseStyle: headphonesVerified Purchase
        I bought the JBL Tune 510BT headphones as an affordable, everyday pair for music, videos, and calls, and they’ve been a really solid purchase.

        Setup was super easy—paired quickly with my phone and reconnects fast after that. The sound is what you expect from JBL: punchy bass, clear enough vocals, and plenty of volume. I’m not an audiophile, but for the price these sound way better than I expected.

        They’re also lightweight and comfortable for longer wear. The on-ear style doesn’t feel heavy on my head, and the buttons are simple to use for skipping tracks and adjusting volume. Battery life has been excellent too—I’m not constantly charging them, which is a huge plus.

        Only minor downside: because they’re on-ear, if you’re very sensitive to pressure you might need a quick break after a long session. But overall, they’re durable, convenient, and a great value.

        If you want dependable Bluetooth headphones with good sound and battery life without spending a lot, the JBL Tune 510BT is an easy recommendation.
        Read more
        6 people found this helpful
        Helpful
         Report
      • Sincere
        4.0 out of 5 stars Bang for your buck
        Reviewed in the United States on November 9, 2025
        Color: RoseStyle: headphonesVerified Purchase
        I've had these things for about a year and a half, and for the price? They hold up. I will say, though, if you have a big head or an afro, this may not be for you. The bridge/casing of the headphones is starting to crack. They still sound good, but I probably only have another year with these. The muffs have fallen off a few times, but they're pretty easy to put back on. With all the adventuring, moving, and exercising I do, these manage to make it pretty well.
        They're pretty lightweight, and the dual connectivity works perfectly. Just pause the thing you were listening to and you're on your other device.
        If you get a call, it stops your other device. Plus decent range. Finally, the audio for 40 dollars banger. If you want some good quality, long-lasting, on-the-go headphones, these are it.
        Read more
        9 people found this helpful

      • Jen
        5.0 out of 5 stars Wonderful headphones!
        Reviewed in the United States on February 19, 2026
        Color: WhiteStyle: headphonesVerified Purchase
        Wow, these really give you the most bang for your buck!! The sound quality is great, and they block out almost too much outside noise. My daughter got these for Christmas and hasn’t put them down since. I almost wish I hadn’t bought them — she loves them that much! Haha.

      • Courtney Richards | Finds For Families
        5.0 out of 5 stars Perfect Headphones for Audiobook Lovers!
        Reviewed in the United States on November 11, 2025
        Color: RoseStyle: headphonesVerified Purchase
        ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ The Perfect Headphones for Audiobook Lovers! Plus they are cute and pink!!!

        I am beyond impressed with these JBL Bluetooth headphones! As someone who listens to audiobooks daily—while commuting, working, cleaning, walking, basically all the time—these have completely elevated my experience.

        First of all, the sound quality is absolutely crystal clear. Voices come through so rich and full that it feels like the narrator is right there with you. The balance is perfect—not too heavy on bass, not tinny—just beautifully tuned for spoken word. Every detail, from subtle background sounds to emotional inflection, comes through effortlessly.

        The Bluetooth connection is flawless. It pairs instantly and stays connected without a single dropout (even when I walk around my house or step outside). I also love the long battery life—I can go days of listening before needing to recharge, which is a huge plus for long audiobook sessions.

        They’re also super comfortable, even after hours of wear. The fit is snug without being tight, and the lightweight design makes them easy to forget you’re even wearing them.

        Another small but important detail: the controls are simple and intuitive. I can pause, skip back, or adjust volume easily while multitasking—no fumbling around trying to figure out which button does what.

        Overall, these JBL headphones have turned my audiobook listening into a totally immersive experience. Whether you’re diving into a mystery, a memoir, or a fantasy series, you’ll feel completely wrapped up in the story.

        If you’re an audiobook addict like me, do yourself a favor and get these. You won’t regret it! 🎧❤️
        Read more

      • Renan Lehnen
        5.0 out of 5 stars QUALIDADE SONORA E DURAÇÃO DE BATERIA
        Reviewed in Brazil on February 8, 2024
        Color: BlackStyle: headphonesVerified Purchase
        Comprei um fone para mim e outro para minha namorada. Estamos usando já tem 2 meses e o fone atende todas as expectativas. O que mais me chamou atenção é a duração da bateria que leva bastante tempo para descarregar. A qualidade do som também muito boa. Trabalho com produção musical e de vez em quando utilizo esses fones como referência. No mais, é um fone bonito, macio, não aperta e não deixa dolorido. Vale bastante a pena pelo preço pois acredito que se for cuidado ele durará bastante tempo.

      Product Summary: JBL Tune 510BT - Bluetooth headphones with up to 40 hours battery, microphone for call, foldable and comfortable, Android and iOs compatible (Rose)

      From JBL

      4.5 out of 5 stars, 90,113 ratings

      Customer reviews

      5K+ bought in past month

      Price

      One-time purchase: THB 1,644.50

      Purchasing options

      Other sellers

      Other sellers

      About this Item

      • NOTE: If headset is too tight we suggest placing them over a ball or something of similar size/shape. Leave undisturbed for at least 24 hours. Repeat if necessary. Please also try length adjustments of either earpiece until both sides best fit you.
      • JBL PURE BASS SOUND: These wirelss headpones feature the renowned JBL Pure Bass sound, which can be found in the most famous venues all around the world.
      • WIRELESS BLUETOOTH: These headphones stream wirelessly from your device and can even switch between two devices so that you don't miss a call.
      • UP TO 40 HOURS BATTERY WITH SPEED CHARGE: For long-lasting fun, listen wirelessly for up to 40 hours and recharge the battery in as little as 2 hours with the convenient Type-C USB cable. A quick 5-minute recharge gives you 2 additional hours of music.
      • MICROPHONE ON EAR CUP FOR HANDS-FREE CALLS: Easily control your sound and manage your calls from your headphones with the convenient buttons on the ear-cup.
      • ASK SIRI OR HEY GOOGLE: Siri or Hey Google is just a button away: activate the voice assistant of your device by pushing the multi-function button.
      • Featuring an adjustable headband the Tune 510BT are designed to fit nearly any head size comfortably

      Product Description

      JBL TUNE 510BT Wireless on-ear headphones The JBL Tune 510BT headphones let you stream powerful JBL Pure Bass sound with no strings attached. Easy to use, with up to 40 hours of battery life and speed charge, they are super lightweight and comfortable. Grab them and fill your day with music! JBL Pure Bass Sound Wireless Bluetooth 5.0 Up to 40 hours battery life with speed charge Microphone on ear cup for hands-free calls Ask Siri or Hey Google For over 70 years, JBL has engineered the most precise, impressive sound found in big venues around the world. Harman's mission and vision is to make life more connected, entertaining, personalized and productive. The company combines passion and purpose to design smart products systems, software and services to connect people wherever they are.
